label: Message to the Hiring Team
value: I am excited to apply for the Oorwin role at Willwaretech. My background in JavaScript, React, Node.js and my focus on becoming a strong Software Engineer make this opportunity especially compelling to me. I would be glad to contribute to Willwaretech's team with a practical, detail-oriented approach to building reliable backend systems and supporting product delivery in onsite engineering environments. With my academic foundation and hands-on project work, I am confident I can add value while continuing to grow in a role aligned with Bengaluru opportunities.

label: Why are you interested in this role?
value: This role aligns with my goal of becoming a strong Software Engineer and uses skills I have practiced through projects and coursework.

label: What makes you a match?
value: My background in JavaScript, React, Node.js, Express closely matches the expectations in this job description.
